summary: Verified Activity Audit Trail and Notification Preferences features. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend verification successful: Activity Log page (/registro-attivita) shows stats, filters, table with audit entries. Settings page (/settings) Notifiche tab shows email toggle, email input, preavviso select, alert type toggles, and save button.

activity_log_stats_endpoint.description: GET /api/activity-log/stats returns stats with today, this_week, total, top_users, top_entities, action_labels, entity_labels

activity_log_list_endpoint.description: GET /api/activity-log returns paginated list with items, total, skip, limit

activity_log_filters.description: Filters work: entity_type=cliente, action=create, search=test, date_from all return 200

get_notification_preferences.description: GET /api/notifications/preferences returns email_alerts_enabled, alert_email, preavviso_giorni, alert_scadenze_pagamento, alert_qualita, user_email

update_notification_preferences.description: PUT /api/notifications/preferences saves and returns updated preferences; verified with GET

client_create_logs_activity.description: Creating a client via POST /api/clients/ logs an activity entry in /api/activity-log

preventivo_create_logs_activity.description: Creating a preventivo via POST /api/preventivi/ logs an activity entry in /api/activity-log

activity_log_entry_structure.description: Activity log entries have correct fields: user_id, user_name, user_email, action, entity_type, entity_id, label, details, timestamp

elements_verified: Title: Registro Attivita with subtitle Audit trail completo di tutte le operazioni
Stats cards: Oggi, Ultima settimana, Totale registri, Utenti attivi (7gg)
Filters: search, entity type dropdown, action dropdown, date pickers
Table with columns: Data/Ora, Utente, Azione, Tipo, Etichetta/ID, Dettagli
All data-testids present: activity-log-title, activity-stats, activity-filters, activity-table-container
Master toggle: Abilita notifiche email (data-testid=notif-master-toggle, notif-enabled-checkbox)
Email input: Email per le notifiche (data-testid=notif-email-input)
Preavviso select: Giorni di preavviso scadenze with options 3/5/7/14/30 (data-testid=notif-preavviso-select)

minor.issue: Console warning: `value` prop on input should not be null - minor React warning, no functional impact

seed_data_creation: Created test user with admin role and session for API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Activity Audit Trail and Notification Preferences features fully verified. Activity log page at /registro-attivita shows audit entries (create/update/delete) for clients, preventivi, commesse, invoices, DDT. Settings page at /settings has a Notifiche tab with email notification preferences (master toggle, email input, preavviso days, alert type toggles). All backend APIs working: GET /api/activity-log, GET /api/activity-log/stats, GET/PUT /api/notifications/preferences. Note: Settings route is /settings NOT /impostazioni.
